narrative_summary: - User asked how to fix missing environment variables when running Dagster Plus pipelines locally
- Read `references/env-vars.md` to understand how `dg` CLI handles environment variables
- Read `references/cli/plus/INDEX.md` to find the relevant Plus CLI commands
- Read `references/cli/plus/pull/env.md` for the `dg plus pull env` command details
- Responded with a solution: use `dg plus login` then `dg plus pull env` to sync env vars from Dagster Plus into a local `.env` file, plus `dg list envs` to see what vars are needed
